movie.actors: Jamie Kennedy, Alan Cumming, Liam Falconer, Ryan Falconer
movie.plot: Tim Avery is a cartoonist who loves his dog Odis. Then one day Odis finds a strange green mask. Then Tim puts it on and has a baby with his wife with the mask on. The baby then gets ahold of powers of the mask. Meanwhile Loki (Alan Cumming) must find the mask before Odin gets mad
movie.title: Son of the Mask
